title: Queue
description: Spec-silent shape (spec sec-4 says only 'write data/queue.json (<=8 clusters, each with ALL source URLs)'; decision logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md). data/queue.json is a top-level array, one entry per ranked cluster (watcher/ranking.py), rank 1 = highest score, capped at 8 entries per the selection algorithm's 'top <=8 clusters' rule. Consumed by the Phase 2 analyst (via scripts/plan_run.py) to write cards -- never authored or edited by an LLM itself.

cluster_hash.description: sha256 of sorted normalized member URLs; same value used as the data/ledger.json entries key.

score.description: primary_source_weight x cross_source_count x hn_velocity_score, per watcher/ranking.py.

outlet.description: Publisher/outlet name where applicable (e.g. HN's linked domain); null for lab/arxiv sources.

points.description: HN points at time of fetch, null for non-HN sources.
